prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 3S-GTE (Gen 3, 2.0L turbo) from a JDM Toyota Caldina GT-T, retaining the original R151 5-speed transmission but reinforcing the bellhousing with a custom billet adapter plate from **Tom’s Racing** to handle the increased torque (300+ lb-ft). The 3S-GTE will be built with **JE Pistons** 87mm forged slugs (8.5:1 compression), **Manley H-beam rods**, and a **TODA Racing** billet crankshaft. Turbocharged with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and paired with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (custom core, 600x300x76mm) to fit the Liteace’s front bumper cavity.

Full **HKS Hi-Power 264° camshafts** (intake/exhaust) with **TODA Racing** valve springs and titanium retainers, mated to a **Jun Auto** head gasket (0.8mm MLS) and **ARP head studs** (12mm, 190,000 psi). Fuel system upgraded with **Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Link G4+ Xtreme ECU** (custom harness by **Haltech** for the Liteace’s unique wiring loom). Exhaust system features a **Sard 4-2-1 header** (1.75" primaries) and a **custom 3" straight-pipe** with a **Sparco 3.5" oval muffler** (resonated, tucked under the rear axle).

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (custom valving for the Liteace’s 1.5-ton weight), **SuperPro** poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms), and **Cusco** 22mm rear sway bar. Braking upgraded to **DBA 4000 Series rotors** (vented, 280mm front/260mm rear) with **Hawk HT-10 pads** and **Goodridge braided lines**. Wheels: **SSR Professor SP1** 15x7 +25 (5x114.3) with **Yokohama Advan A052** 195/50R15 tires (stretched fitment for fender clearance).
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 Liteace** widebody kit (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares), paired with a **Veilside Fortune front bumper** (customized with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** featuring a 3" cowl scoop for the intercooler). Rear bumper replaced with a **Tom’s Racing** JDM-spec unit (dual exhaust cutouts) and a **custom carbon fiber diffuser** (integrated tow hook). Side skirts from **C-West** (JDM-spec, bolt-on) with **OEM Toyota** Super Exceed side markers removed and replaced with **Morimoto XB LED bulbs**.

Roof chopped 2" (custom fabrication by **Auto Service Tokyo**) and replaced with a **Seibon carbon fiber hardtop** (painted matte black, integrated **GReddy RS** rear wing mounts). Windows tinted with **3M Crystalline 90%** (illegal in most regions, but period-correct for 90s JDM). Interior stripped and fitted with **Bride Zeta III** seats (custom mounts for Liteace floorpan), **Nardi Classic** 350mm steering wheel (quick-release hub), and a **Defi BF** gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod**.

Engine bay detailed with **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** (slim profile, dual 12" fans), **HKS SSQV** blow-off valve (plumbed back into the intake), and **custom aluminum catch can** (dual baffled, 1L capacity). Paint: **PPG Toyota Super White II** (original color) with **House of Kolor** Kandy Apple Red accents (lower rockers, mirror caps, and roof). Underbody coated with **Dynamat Xtreme** (full coverage) and **LizardSkin Ceramic Insulation** (firewall, floor, and transmission tunnel).
